creator: sko@rostwald.de
text:
(In reply to Alastair Hogge from comment #19)
+1 for a patchfile
I'm happy to test and assisting to get it working. I have 13.3-R & 14.1-R buildhosts and desktop systems available.


(In reply to Ivan Rozhuk from comment #18)
Sorry if it's awkward/inappropriate to ask, but what amount of sponsoring (ballpark figures) are we talking about? I'd be happy to chime in if some kind of "public sponsoring" is on the table...


I've been using DeadBeef for 10+ years now, would be sad to see it vanish from ports as I really don't want to switch to some bloated "wants to do it all"-player...
